kilauea_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY DAILY UPDATE
kilauea_notices.message: HVO Kilauea YELLOW/ADVISORY - The Halemaʻumaʻu eruption of Kīlauea is paused. Glow was visible from both eruptive vents overnight. Summit inflation continues, and forecast models suggest that episode 48 fountains will likely start either today or tomorrow (Monday or Tuesday).

mauna_loa_notices.title: HAWAIIAN VOLCANO OBSERVATORY MONTHLY UPDATE
mauna_loa_notices.message: HVO Haleakala GREEN/NORMAL - No activity of concern for Haleakalā.
